name: Central Phitsanulok / Highway 12 retail core
capture_notes: Primary urban retail node around Central, adjacent large-format retail, and Highway 12 frontage. Suitable for destination or mall-surface charging if ingress and reserved bays are strong.

name: Old city / Wat Yai / railway / riverfront core
capture_notes: Dense civic, tourism, rail, temple, and hotel demand in the legacy city core. Better for compact city-center charging than very large hub format.

name: Airport / Aranyik urban band
capture_notes: Airport and Aranyik-side demand supported by scheduled passengers, receiver traffic, car rental, and north-side city access roads.

name: Naresuan University / Tha Pho medical-education cluster
capture_notes: Large university and teaching-hospital node with strong daily recurring trips and good fit for destination-oriented DC charging.

name: Bus terminal 2 / bypass / Samo Khae logistics fringe
capture_notes: Bypass-side intercity bus, logistics, and large-format retail growth zone. Strong candidate for roadside-destination hybrid charging.

name: Wang Thong / Route 12 east gateway
capture_notes: Main eastbound gateway from Mueang toward Phetchabun, Lom Sak, and mountain tourism traffic. Better suited to corridor capture than inner-city repeat demand.

name: Nakhon Thai / Route 12 mountain corridor
capture_notes: District corridor node toward Phu Hin Rong Kla and Loei-side travel. Include for province screening but not as strong as the city clusters.
